'''Thrakia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with large land masses and rich in natural resources located in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of an [[Unidentified Thrakia species|unidentified species]], described as an intelligent [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]].

==Behind the scenes==
The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places Thrakia in the "Quelli Sector", a misspelling of the true [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]], of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
